User Story: As an AI, I open the docs so the home page (or a given path) loads in both the headless browser and the VSCode pane.
Expected Behavior (from code): No path => resolves '/' against docs baseUrl; engine.goto loads it; pane.show mirrors; returns 'Loaded <url>' + 'Title: <title>' (+ '(HTTP <status>)' on >=400).
Notes: Live: loaded home (port 61213). Shares B2 fix (HTTP-status note via shared goto path).

User Story: As an AI, I navigate to a specific doc page; both headless browser and pane move there.
Expected Behavior (from code): Requires path; resolves to absolute URL; engine.goto + pane.show; returns 'Loaded <url>' + title (+ '(HTTP <status>)' on >=400).
Notes: Live nav + sync OK. B2 FIXED + live-verified: navigate to 404 appends '(HTTP 404)', 200 pages stay clean.

User Story: As an AI, I confirm where I landed by reading the current title + URL.
Expected Behavior (from code): Returns 'Title: <title or (none)>' + 'URL: <url>'.
Notes: Live OK.

User Story: As an AI, I read the rendered visible text of the current page.
Expected Behavior (from code): Returns innerText of body, or '(no text)'.
Notes: Live OK. 'Homestringsnumbers' run-together is sample-doc nav markup, not a tool defect.

User Story: As an AI, I list the links (anchor text + resolved href) on the current page.
Expected Behavior (from code): Returns '- <text> -> <href>' per anchor[href], or '(no links)'.
Notes: Live OK. Duplicate entries = page links each module twice; faithful to DOM.

User Story: As an AI, I list all HTML pages available in the docs directory.
Expected Behavior (from code): Walks docsDir on disk; sorted '- <relpath>' for .html/.htm.
Notes: Live: 3 pages listed.

User Story: As an AI, I capture a PNG (viewport / full-page / one element), optionally saved to disk.
Expected Behavior (from code): viewport default; fullPage; selector; savePath writes file + appends 'Saved screenshot to <abs>'.
Notes: All 4 modes live: viewport, selector(h1 cropped), fullPage, savePath wrote valid 1280x800 PNG.

User Story: As an AI, I read console messages/errors since last navigation.
Expected Behavior (from code): '[<type>] <text> (<location>)' or '(no console messages)'.
Notes: Live clean on good page; integration test catches console.error.

User Story: As an AI, I find broken assets / failed requests on the current page.
Expected Behavior (from code): Filters failed or status>=400; 'FAILED|<status> <method> <url>'.
Notes: Live caught '404 GET .../does-not-exist.html'.

User Story: As an AI, I crawl the doc set to find broken links and orphan pages.
Expected Behavior (from code): Crawl from startPath; 'Visited N page(s).' + broken + orphans.
Notes: Live clean (4 visits). Integration flags planted broken + orphan. Minor: '/' and '/index.html' counted as 2 visits (defensible).

User Story: As an AI, I click an element by CSS selector or visible text; pane follows if it navigates.
Expected Behavior (from code): selector or getByText(text).first(); 'Navigated to'/'Clicked; still at'; errors if neither arg.
Notes: B1 FIXED: selector now uses .first(). Re-verified LIVE (a[href*=strings] -> navigated to strings.html) + automated regression. text + no-arg paths still PASS.

User Story: As an AI, I inspect pane state for sync confirmation/debugging.
Expected Behavior (from code): JSON: panelExists, requestedUrl, preflightStatus, webviewLoaded, events[].
Notes: Live OK; preflightStatus tracks 200 and 404 correctly.

User Story: As an AI, I reload the current page after regenerating docs.
Expected Behavior (from code): engine.reload + pane.reload; 'Reloaded <url>' (+ '(HTTP <status>)' on >=400).
Notes: Live OK. B2 fix: reload on a 404 appends '(HTTP 404)' (automated regression green).

User Story: As an AI, I go back in history; pane follows.
Expected Behavior (from code): engine.back; 'No back history.' or 'Back: <url>' (+ '(HTTP <status>)' on >=400).
Notes: Live OK; B2 status note threaded through back.

User Story: As an AI, I go forward in history; pane follows.
Expected Behavior (from code): engine.forward; 'No forward history.' or 'Forward: <url>' (+ '(HTTP <status>)' on >=400).
Notes: Live OK; B2 status note threaded through forward.

User Story: As a human, I see a 'Docs Browser' icon in the activity bar.
Expected Behavior (from code): viewsContainers.activitybar 'docsBrowser' with media/docs.svg.
Notes: media/docs.svg present; wiring OK; visually confirmed prior session.

User Story: As a human, I see a list of all HTML doc pages in the sidebar.
Expected Behavior (from code): TreeDataProvider lists OPEN_ITEM + sorted .html files (recursive).
Notes: Logic verified; list_pages live confirms file discovery.

User Story: As a human, I click 'Open Docs Browser' to open the home page.
Expected Behavior (from code): docsBrowser.open (no arg) => '/' => engine.goto + pane.show.
Notes: Handler == open_docs path (verified live).

User Story: As a human, I click a page in the tree to open it.
Expected Behavior (from code): Tree item passes relpath => docsBrowser.open(relpath).
Notes: Handler == navigate path (verified live).

User Story: As a human with no docs, I see guidance + an Open button.
Expected Behavior (from code): viewsWelcome shown when the view has no items.
Notes: NOTE: getChildren always prepends OPEN_ITEM, so welcome only shows when no folder is open. Missing-docs case handled by an informative error toast on Open. Acceptable; not a fix.

User Story: As a human, I refresh to re-scan pages and reload the pane.
Expected Behavior (from code): refresh => tree refresh + (if started) engine.reload + pane.reload.
Notes: Reload verified live; refresh wiring OK.

User Story: As a human, navigations reuse ONE pane tab, no new tab each time.
Expected Behavior (from code): createWebviewPanel once; later shows reveal + postMessage navigate.
Notes: Core fix holds: pane_state shows one panel across many navs. B3 FIXED + live-verified: single 'loaded' event on first open (was two).

User Story: As a human, opening docs doesn't steal focus from editor/terminal.
Expected Behavior (from code): preserveFocus:true on create + reveal.
Notes: Wiring correct; confirmed prior session.

User Story: As a human, I can select and copy text in the docs pane.
Expected Behavior (from code): localhost iframe of real served HTML (allow-same-origin).
Notes: Architecture verified; screenshots show real rendered DOM.

User Story: As a user, I point the extension at my generated docs directory.
Expected Behavior (from code): Default 'docs'; relative->workspace; absolute respected; missing => error toast.
Notes: Live serving docs/. Missing-dir guard verified by code (fs.existsSync).

User Story: As a user, I set the MCP port that .mcp.json references.
Expected Behavior (from code): Default 8765; strictPort: EADDRINUSE => error toast, degraded.
Notes: strictPort proven by mcp.mjs (2nd listen rejects). Live MCP on 8765.

User Story: The docs server serves files with correct MIME and no-cache.
Expected Behavior (from code): extension->MIME; dir->index.html; cache-control no-cache.
Notes: Live: /index.html 200 text/html; docs.mjs green.

User Story: The docs server refuses paths outside docsDir.
Expected Behavior (from code): resolved path must be root or under root+sep else 403; bad encoding 400; missing 404.
Notes: Raw socket test: full %2f-encoded ../ => 403; half-encoded => normalized to inside-root => 404. No escape.

User Story: The MCP server survives VSCode reloads (no stale sessions).
Expected Behavior (from code): Fresh McpServer+transport per request; teardown on res close.
Notes: mcp.mjs green; survived prior VSCode reload.

User Story: The MCP endpoint handles only /mcp and valid methods.
Expected Behavior (from code): non-/mcp 404; bad method 405; invalid JSON -32700; internal -32603.
Notes: Live curls: /foo 404, PUT 405, bad-json 400/-32700.

User Story: If Chromium/sidecar crashes, tools recover without reloading VSCode.
Expected Behavior (from code): makeEngine re-spawns child on exit; next tool call relaunches.
Notes: Live: killed process group 57479; next call re-spawned (PID 58687), home re-loads.

User Story: Closing VSCode doesn't leave orphan Chromium/node.
Expected Behavior (from code): deactivate => dispose graceful shutdown + conditional POSIX group-kill.
Notes: Group-kill semantics demonstrated (kill -9 -pgid took Chromium children). deactivate path by code.

User Story: Console/network reflect only the current page.
Expected Behavior (from code): Ring buffers cap 200; cleared each goto/back/forward/reload + new page.
Notes: Observed: clean on good pages; only current 404 surfaced after nav.

User Story: MCP is listening before Claude Code connects.
Expected Behavior (from code): onStartupFinished; ensureStarted binds MCP port during activation.
Notes: Wiring OK; tools connected this session.

User Story: Friendly errors when no folder / docs dir missing.
Expected Behavior (from code): No workspace => toast; missing dir => toast; partial failure closes docsServer.
Notes: Code-verified guards + cleanup.

User Story: As an AI, clicking a[href] that appears twice should click the first match, not error.
Expected Behavior (from code): DONE: sidecar/main.ts uses locator(selector).first().click(), matching the text path.
Notes: Verified LIVE (a[href*=strings], 2 matches -> navigated to strings.html) + automated integration regression. sidecar-side fix, active immediately on sidecar respawn.

Feature: nav tools report success on non-2xx
User Story: As an AI testing docs, a navigation to a 404/500 page should be flagged, not reported as a plain success.
Expected Behavior (from code): DONE: sidecar captures response.status() on goto/back/forward/reload; threaded through SidecarResponse + NavResult; tools.ts appends '(HTTP <status>)' when >=400.
Notes: Verified LIVE on reloaded host (navigate + reload to 404 => '(HTTP 404)'; healthy 200 page stays clean) + automated integration regression.

Feature: pane double-loads iframe on first open
User Story: As a human, opening a page should load the iframe once, not twice (avoid flash/perf).
Expected Behavior (from code): DONE: webview script skips re-setting f.src when navigate url equals currentUrl (first show no longer re-sets the same src).
Notes: Verified LIVE on reloaded host (pane_state shows a single 'loaded' event on first open, was two) + pane.mjs build.
